description: Payment processing via Paymob gateway - initiate checkout and receive webhook callbacks

endpoints.name: Initiate Paymob Payment
endpoints.description: Start a payment session via Paymob - authenticates, creates order, returns iframe payment URL

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called after order is placed and user selects online payment. Opens Paymob payment iframe/page for card or mobile wallet payment.

paymentUrl.description: URL to redirect user to Paymob payment page

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Redirects user to Paymob payment page or opens in iframe. Shows loading spinner during payment initialization.

endpoints.name: Paymob Webhook
endpoints.description: Receive asynchronous payment result callback from Paymob server

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Paymob sends payment status here. Backend updates order status based on payment result. User sees updated status on next page load/refresh.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: No direct frontend display - order status updates asynchronously. User sees updated status when they refresh or navigate to orders page.
